name: ml-research
label: ML Research
description: Machine learning or deep learning research. Python-heavy, GPU compute, experiment tracking.
profile_description: GPU compute required for training runs. Use hosted or cluster inference for production.
run_context_additions: - Record for every run: model id, device, backend, batch size, runtime, artifact outputs, and the config version + code SHA that produced them.

- Pre-scale gate: before any large paid run — (1) first-principles audit of the pipeline architecture, (2) a measured smoke test at minimal scale, (3) explicit operator spend approval. Patches do not clear the gate; systemic soundness does.
- Cost acknowledgment required before any paid inference or training run.
- GPU memory is the primary constraint — log batch size and gradient accumulation settings.
- Prefer remote GPU or cluster for training; local machine for exploration and debugging only.
- On a cluster that uses environment modules rather than conda, `module load` the desired Python and set `EPISTEME_PYTHON_PREFIX` (or `EPISTEME_PYTHON`) to pin it.
workflow_notes: Use the `overnight-loop` skill for hyperparameter sweeps and long training loops — write the invariant file first (metric dry-run + iteration-0 baseline included).
Log experiment results to the project's declared progress doc after each significant run (EVENTS.md index + NEXT_STEPS.md in the default scaffold).
Record GPU backend, model id, and quota constraints in `docs/RUN_CONTEXT.md`.
Keep raw data, model weights, and checkpoints out of Git — add them to `.gitignore`.
Prefer small smoke-test runs locally before scaling to full compute.

Config discipline (two surfaces): versioned input/artifact paths live in ONE config module (env-overridable); behavioral tunables live in ONE grouped constants module wired through argparse defaults, with env flags resolved at call time, not import time. Centralize by inventory, not blindly — classify every value (move / env-flag / stays-coupled / stays-vendor / stays-frozen) and record why the stays stay; guard the convention with a build-failing tripwire (a new inline hyperparam or unregistered flag fails CI).

Stage promotions are gated by a recorded measurement artifact — measured metrics plus an explicit verdict token plus the disconfirmation evidence checked (what was NOT lost) — assertion alone never advances the pipeline.
Reserve 'gold' naming for human-verified truth: machine/LLM-labeled sets carry their tier in the filename, and every reported metric names the ground-truth tier it was measured against.
Confirm on multiple seeds before claiming generalization — one seed is an anecdote.
Ship behavior changes behind default-OFF flags recorded with their defaults — the legacy path stays reproducible and reversal is one env var; a green regression suite is a precondition, not a goal.
safety_notes: Cost acknowledgment required before any paid inference or training run.
Never commit model weights, large datasets, or API keys.
Protect checkpoints from accidental deletion — verify paths before any `rm`.
Treat GPU quota as a shared resource — record usage in action_log.
